name: Pumpkin Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pumpkin in cider until tender, about 15 to 20 minutes.
2. Mash the pumpkin or blend it with some of the cooking liquid using a blender.
3. Return the mashed pumpkin and remaining cider to an open kettle. Simmer the mixture until it forms a mound when dropped from a spoon onto a cool saucer.
4. Add cinnamon, ground cloves, and nutmeg. Pour into clean jars and label. Keep cool and use within four weeks.
